message:
fix(tests): update doctor output format expectations and add PERF-3X critical bead validation

tests/e2e_golden_path.rs: Update all doctor E2E tests to match new output
format — verdict→overall, confidence→findings, risk_banner→summary. Allow
exit code 1 for FAIL verdicts (doctor now uses non-zero exit for failures).
Remove confidence score assertions replaced by structural findings checks.

tests/ci_full_suite_gate.rs: Add PERF3X_CRITICAL_BEADS constant listing 7
implementation beads that must appear in the coverage matrix. Add fail-closed
validation: missing any critical bead now returns an error. Add test
perf3x_bead_coverage_contract_fails_closed_on_missing_critical_bead.
Update run_all_wires test to include new claim_integrity assertions for
matrix_primary_outcomes_status_valid and cells_primary_e2e_metrics_present.

tests/bench_schema.rs: Relax positive-metric requirement for matrix cells
and primary_outcomes with "fail" status, since failed cells may have null
metrics when underlying data is missing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
